summary: Cycle 97 v10 (b) HP-3 H1 minimal variant DISPROVEN. Setting messages[0].agentId from null → UUID did NOT change TRPCClientError class/message/cause. Same v9 (a) signature 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object'. Mission PROTECTED — no real LLM PII fallback. New diagnostic: input.agentId / input.agentsApiAgentId at TOP-LEVEL of mutation payload are undefined (separate from per-message agentId in messages[]) — strong next candidate.

key_findings.1_hp3_h1_disproven: HP-3 H1 (messages[0].agentId=null causes Object.keys throw) refuted by direct evidence — UUID set didn't change error class/message/cause.
key_findings.2_failing_field_elsewhere: The failing field is NOT messages[0].agentId. Same error persists with UUID set.
key_findings.3_new_diagnostic_top_level_agentid: Mutation input shows `input.agentId: undefined` AND `input.agentsApiAgentId: undefined` at the TOP LEVEL of the payload (separate from per-message agentId in messages[]) — strong next candidate for HP-3 H2 minimal variant.
key_findings.4_body_size_anomaly: Response body 0.2 kB << v10 baseline 1597B target. Engine team should verify v10 envelope was actually emitted on this request (could be a different code path or pre-emit failure).

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: HP-3 H1 (per-message agentId=null) refuted. Pivot to top-level input.agentId / input.agentsApiAgentId.
next_steps: No emergency revert needed (mission safe — same protection profile as v7/v9)
Pivot off HP-3 H1; investigate top-level input.agentId / input.agentsApiAgentId and remaining envelope nulls (parentId, parentMessageId, vote, model)
Consider next minimal variant: HP-3 H2 = top-level input.agentId set to sentinel UUID
Verify v10 envelope emission (body 0.2 kB suspicious — may need engine-side log inspection)
recommendation.checklist_impact: Per checklist §2: HP-3 H1 DISPROVEN. v10 candidates list narrowed. Next iteration should target top-level agentId (separate field from per-message agentId).
